attacking_style: Excels in uphill sprint finishes, capitalizing on positioning errors in technical finals. Strikes when favorites lose position through curves in closing meters.
team_tactics: Opportunistic positioning to benefit from other teams' leadout work. Relies on individual positioning skill rather than team support in decisive moments.
terrain_preference: Uphill sprint finishes with technical approach through curves that disrupt organized leadouts. Benefits from gradient transitions that neutralize pure sprinters.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to establish clear weaknesses. May depend on positioning chaos rather than raw power against organized sprint trains.
key_patterns: Excels at navigating technical finales with curves better than sprint favorites
Times uphill sprint efforts precisely to peak at optimal moment
Capitalizes on positioning mistakes by stronger teams in final meters
form_trajectory: positive: Strong performance defeating Van Aert at Dauphine served as significant pre-Tour form indicator
